title: Top 5 cleaning trends to make your home sparkle
description: LIFESTYLE NEWS - Technology is taking over...
bodyText:
LIFESTYLE NEWS - Technology is taking over every aspect of our lives – including (thankfully) cleaning.

From multitasking cleaning products to smart appliances that make your home sparkle at the touch of a button, there are more and more ways to make your life easier and your cleaning faster.


> Here are the top five cleaning trends for 2024:


- Sustainability: A growing emphasis on sustainability has led to an increase in eco-friendly and biodegradable cleaning products. These products often come in recyclable packaging and are free from harsh chemicals. Tip: Try washing powder sheets that contain 64% less plastic than the equivalent 2kg washing powder bags.
- Smart cleaning devices: Be it robotic vacuum cleaners or AI-powered cleaning systems – smart cleaning devices continue to rise. These devices can be controlled via smartphone apps and offer advanced features like mapping and scheduling.
- Touchless cleaning systems: Automatic soap dispensers and motion-sensor faucets are being adopted to maintain hygiene and reduce the spread of germs.
- Multi-functionality: Versatile cleaning products that can be used on multiple surfaces and for various purposes, reducing the need for numerous different products, is a trend we are loving! One of our must-haves is Chemico Liqui-Cleen with 3X extreme clean with ActiBeads is fast-acting, deodorises and power cleans making it an effective all-purpose cleaner leaving ALL surfaces (kitchen, bathroom and even your tiles) clean and fresh. It also offers an eco-friendly option with a refill pouch, eliminating unnecessary waste.
- Disinfection and sanitisation: There is also a heightened focus on disinfection and sanitisation, especially in high-touch areas like doorknobs, light switches, and electronic devices. A product such as Milton, known mostly as a sterilisation product for baby items, can be used to sterilise many items around the house including your fridge, microwave, shower curtains and so much more.

Happy cleaning!

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
